messages.content: [mock] We will practice English about travel. Please try to use these words: apple, banana, travel. For level A2, here is my first question: what comes to your mind when you think about travel?
I want to go to Japan next year.

[mock] Let's keep talking about travel. Try to use these words naturally: apple, banana, travel. You said: I want to go to Japan next year.. My question for level A2: what is your opinion about travel?
